theme: Commit coarse bits before you can refine detail
title: Nested Dyadic Quantization Under a Split Budget
strategies: trivial: zero splits, every channel reconstructed by its own single-leaf weighted mean
greedy: myopic best-first tree growth -- at each step split whichever open leaf gives the largest IMMEDIATE SSE drop -- the CART-style recipe that is the trap

strong: per-channel tree-knapsack DP (exact SSE achievable at every local split budget) composed with a global knapsack DP allocating the shared budget across channels -- sees that an unattractive coarse split is sometimes the only gate to a much richer fine split
invalid: claims one more split than the shared budget allows
